Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: What is the style of the underside postdiscal striae (the transverse markings)?
Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.choice: White, straight or slightly wavy striae

Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: Is the underside ground colour white with blackish-brown markings (an inverted pattern unusual for the genus)?
Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.choice: No — grey or pale grey ground with white striae

Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: On the hindwing underside, are the submarginal spots prominently black and wedge-shaped (∧), elongated spots between the inner and outer submarginal striae?
Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.choice: No — submarginal spots absent or not wedge-shaped (∧)

Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: Are the spaces between the HW inner and outer submarginal striae distinctly darkened?
Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.choice: No — submarginal area not distinctly darkened

Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: Is the forewing postdiscal band completely dislocated at vein 3 — the portion in space 3 shifted basad (inward), out of line with the band in spaces 4 and 5?
Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.choice: No — band continuous, space 3 more or less in line with spaces 4 and 5

Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: On the hindwing underside, how many pairs of continuous white lines are present?
Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.choice: Two pairs of continuous white lines (subbasal pair and discal pair)

Jamides malaccanus malaccanus.question: Are the underside white markings clearly visible from the upperside by transparency? (Jamides malaccanus vs parasaturatus — upperside or back-lit character)
